title: Ballistic missile launch detected
title_en: Ballistic missile launch detected
title_uk: Виявлено запуск балістичної ракети
description: The Air Force reports that on the night of May 9 (from 18:00 on May 8), the enemy attacked Ukraine with an Iskander-M ballistic missile from Crimea and 43 strike UAVs of the Shahed, Gerbera, Italmas type and Parody simulator drones. A missile and 9 strike UAVs were hit at 6 locations, as well as downed (debris) at 2 locations. It is somehow difficult to call Iskander's strike a truce...
description_en: The Air Force reports that on the night of May 9 (from 18:00 on May 8), the enemy attacked Ukraine with an Iskander-M ballistic missile from Crimea and 43 strike UAVs of the Shahed, Gerbera, Italmas type and Parody simulator drones. A missile and 9 strike UAVs were hit at 6 locations, as well as downed (debris) at 2 locations. It is somehow difficult to call Iskander's strike a truce...
description_uk: Воздушные силы сообщают, что в ночь на 9 мая (с 18:00 8 мая) противник атаковал Украину баллистической ракетой Искандер-М из Крыма и 43 ударными БпЛА типа Shahed, Гербера, Италмас и дронами-имитаторами «Пародия». Зафиксировано попадание ракеты и 9 ударных БПЛА на 6 локациях, а также падение сбитых (обломки) на 2 локациях. Как-то сложно назвать удар Искандером перемирием...

The port of Odesa remains a vital lifeline for the country’s economy, enabling exports and connecting Ukraine to global trade routes. To keep this corridor open, Ukrainian naval forces carry out dangerous missions to detect and neutralize sea...

title: 400 drones
title_en: 400 drones

description: 😎 Meanwhile, Russian monitors are whining that Ukraine has allegedly launched more than 400 UAVs on the territory of the Russian Federation. They complain that their air defense forces will not be able to shoot down all the targets.

title: In Dnipro, he visited our soldiers who are undergoing treatment after...
title_en: In Dnipro, he visited our soldiers who are undergoing treatment after...
title_uk: У Дніпрі він відвідав наших військових, які проходять лікування після...
description: In Dnipro, he visited our soldiers who are undergoing treatment after being wounded. He thanked for his service to Ukraine, for his strength and resilience and honored him with state awards. He also spoke with the doctors of the hospital and awarded him the orders of Danylo Halytskyi and Princess Olga of the 3rd degree, the medals "For Military Service to Ukraine" and "For Saved Life". It is thanks to such people that the lives of our defenders are saved every day. Thank you...
description_en: In Dnipro, he visited our soldiers who are undergoing treatment after being wounded. He thanked for his service to Ukraine, for his strength and resilience and honored him with state awards. He also spoke with the doctors of the hospital and awarded him the orders of Danylo Halytskyi and Princess Olga of the 3rd degree, the medals "For Military Service to Ukraine" and "For Saved Life". It is thanks to such people that the lives of our defenders are saved every day. Thank you...
description_uk: У Дніпрі відвідав наших воїнів, які проходять лікування після поранень. Подякував за службу Україні, за силу і стійкість та відзначив державними нагородами. Поспілкувався і з медиками госпіталю та нагородив орденами Данила Галицького і княгині Ольги ІІІ ступеня, медалями «За військову службу Україні» та «За врятоване життя». Саме завдяки таким людям щодня рятуються життя наших захисників. Дякую...

title: Kyiv: Attack attack
title_en: Kyiv: Attack attack
title_uk: Київ: Атака
description: Update: Massive forest fire sparked by Russian strikes in Ukraine’s north doubles in size, drifts toward Russia. The fire, previously estimated at around 2,400 hectares (5,930 acres) on May 7, has now expanded to about 4,300 hectares (10,600 acres).
description_en: Update: Massive forest fire sparked by Russian strikes in Ukraine’s north doubles in size, drifts toward Russia. The fire, previously estimated at around 2,400 hectares (5,930 acres) on May 7, has now expanded to about 4,300 hectares (10,600 acres).

title: Air defense active
title_en: Air defense active
title_uk: Активна ППО
description: Ukrainian P1-SUN interceptors shot down Russian Gerbers with FPV drones on board for the first time. According to reports, the Ukrainian military destroyed five such UAVs in a day. The video shows that FPV drones with an X-shaped frame and propellers were attached to the "Gerbers". Earlier, "Gerbera" was more often used by Russia as a cheap fake drone for reloading air defense or as a scout. Now the invaders are testing it as...
description_en: Ukrainian P1-SUN interceptors shot down Russian Gerbers with FPV drones on board for the first time. According to reports, the Ukrainian military destroyed five such UAVs in a day. The video shows that FPV drones with an X-shaped frame and propellers were attached to the "Gerbers". Earlier, "Gerbera" was more often used by Russia as a cheap fake drone for reloading air defense or as a scout. Now the invaders are testing it as...
description_uk: Украинские перехватчики P1-SUN впервые сбили российские "Герберы" с FPV-дронами на борту Как сообщается, за сутки украинские военные уничтожили пять таких БПЛА. На видео видно, что на "Герберах" были закреплены FPV-дроны с Х-образной рамой и пропеллерами. "Гербера" раньше чаще использовалась россией как дешевый ложный дрон для перегрузки ПВО или как разведчик. Теперь оккупанты тестируют ее как...

Yesterday and on the night of May 8, 2026, units of the Defense Forces of Ukraine inflicted damage on a number of important facilities of the Russian occupiers. ⚡️In particular, the oil refinery "Yaroslavl" in Yaroslavl region, Russian Federation was affected. A fire was recorded on the territory. The extent of the damage is being clarified. "Yaroslavlsky" Refinery - strategically...

A fire was recorded on the territory. The extent of the damage is being clarified. "Yaroslavlsky" Refinery - strategically...
description_uk: Уражено НПЗ “Ярославльський”, нафтобазу, склади ПММ та об'єкти ППО ворога Вчора та в ніч на 8 травня 2026 року підрозділи Сил оборони України завдали уражень по низці важливих об’єктів російських окупантів. ⚡️Зокрема уражено нафтопереробний завод “Ярославльський” у Ярославській області, рф. На території зафіксовано пожежу. Ступінь завданих збитків уточнюється. НПЗ “Ярославльський” – стратегічно...

title: Dnipro: Evacuation ordered
title_en: Dnipro: Evacuation ordered
title_uk: Дніпро: видано евакуацію
description: Meeting on the security situation in the Dnipro region: in detail about the liquidation of the consequences of Russian strikes, the protection of critical infrastructure, the work of air defense in the region and logistics. Evacuation of the wounded, supplies to the front - all this depends, in particular, on the quality of the roads and their security. There should be more work on this in the communities of Dnipro Oblast, we need to speed it up. Virtually constant drone threat in Nikopol...
description_en: Meeting on the security situation in the Dnipro region: in detail about the liquidation of the consequences of Russian strikes, the protection of critical infrastructure, the work of air defense in the region and logistics. Evacuation of the wounded, supplies to the front - all this depends, in particular, on the quality of the roads and their security. There should be more work on this in the communities of Dnipro Oblast, we need to speed it up. Virtually constant drone threat in Nikopol...
description_uk: Нарада щодо безпекової ситуації на Дніпровщині: детально про ліквідацію наслідків російських ударів, захист критичної інфраструктури, роботу ППО в регіоні та логістику. Евакуація поранених, постачання на фронт – усе це залежить, зокрема, від якості доріг та їх захищеності. Роботи над цим має бути більше у громадах Дніпровщини, потрібно прискорюватися. Практично постійна дронова загроза в Нікополі...

title: On this Day of Remembrance and Victory over Nazism in the Second...
title_en: On this Day of Remembrance and Victory over Nazism in the Second...
title_uk: У цей День пам’яті та перемоги над нацизмом у Другій...
description: On this Day of Remembrance and Victory over Nazism in the Second World War, we pay our respects to those who died and to all those who defended the world from Nazism. The Second World War became one of the most terrible tragedies in the history of mankind. Millions of Ukrainians fought in various armies of the anti-Hitler coalition and fought underground, and our lands became the site of great battles and enormous human suffering. More than 8 million Ukrainians...
description_en: On this Day of Remembrance and Victory over Nazism in the Second World War, we pay our respects to those who died and to all those who defended the world from Nazism. The Second World War became one of the most terrible tragedies in the history of mankind. Millions of Ukrainians fought in various armies of the anti-Hitler coalition and fought underground, and our lands became the site of great battles and enormous human suffering. More than 8 million Ukrainians...
description_uk: У цей День пам’яті та перемоги над нацизмом у Другій світовій війні віддаємо шану загиблим і всім, хто боронив світ від нацизму. Друга світова війна стала однією з найстрашніших трагедій в історії людства. Мільйони українців воювали в різних арміях антигітлерівської коаліції та боролися у підпіллі, а наші землі стали місцем великих битв і величезних людських страждань. Понад 8 мільйонів українців...

title: Crimea: On May 8, Ukraine celebrates the Day of Remembrance and Victory over...
title_en: Crimea: On May 8, Ukraine celebrates the Day of Remembrance and Victory over...
title_uk: Крим: 8 травня Україна відзначає День пам'яті та перемоги над...
description: On May 8, Ukraine celebrates the Day of Remembrance and Victory over Nazism in the Second World War, honoring those who died in 1939-1945. This day was established by the Law of Ukraine in 2023 as a sign of solidarity with Europe in memory of that terrible tragedy in the history of mankind. The commemorative symbol of the Second World War is also the commemorative poppy. More than 10 years ago, Ukraine joined the tradition of celebrating...
description_en: On May 8, Ukraine celebrates the Day of Remembrance and Victory over Nazism in the Second World War, honoring those who died in 1939-1945. This day was established by the Law of Ukraine in 2023 as a sign of solidarity with Europe in memory of that terrible tragedy in the history of mankind. The commemorative symbol of the Second World War is also the commemorative poppy. More than 10 years ago, Ukraine joined the tradition of celebrating...
description_uk: 8 травня Україна відзначає День пам’яті та перемоги над нацизмом у Другій світовій війні, вшановуючи загиблих у 1939–1945 роках. Цей день встановлено Законом України у 2023 році на знак солідарності з Європою в пам’яті про ту страшну трагедію в історії людства. Спільним також є символ памʼяті про Другу світову війну – мак памʼяті. Понад 10 років тому Україна долучилася до традиції відзначення...

Aurora 2026 covers the key components of modern defense: operations on land, in the air and at sea. The main goal of the exercises is to strengthen...

Aurora 2026 covers the key components of modern defense: operations on land, in the air and at sea. The main goal of the exercises is to strengthen...

title: Explosions reported
title_en: Explosions reported
title_uk: Повідомляється про вибухи
description: In Latvia, they are still looking for the drone that flew yesterday from the Russian Federation. According to the authorities, the drone may have fallen in the sparsely populated Rezekne region of Latgale, but it has not yet been found. The military believes that the drone can be explosive.
description_en: In Latvia, they are still looking for the drone that flew yesterday from the Russian Federation. According to the authorities, the drone may have fallen in the sparsely populated Rezekne region of Latgale, but it has not yet been found. The military believes that the drone can be explosive.
description_uk: В Латвии до сих пор ищут дрон, залетевший вчера со стороны рф По данным властей, беспилотник мог упасть в малонаселенном Резекненском крае Латгалии, однако найти его пока не удалось. Военные считают, что дрон может быть взрывоопасным.

title: Today is the Day of Remembrance and Victory over Nazism. The day when...
title_en: Today is the Day of Remembrance and Victory over Nazism. The day when...
title_uk: Сьогодні День пам'яті та перемоги над нацизмом. День, коли...
description: Today is the Day of Remembrance and Victory over Nazism. The day when all of Europe celebrates the end of the most terrible war of the 20th century - a war after which there should be only real peace. This is what was dreamed of when the guns of the Second World War began to fall silent. That war turned our land into a field of brutal battles, abuse in the occupied territory, mass destruction of people and lives. Losses of the Ukrainian people...
description_en: Today is the Day of Remembrance and Victory over Nazism. The day when all of Europe celebrates the end of the most terrible war of the 20th century - a war after which there should be only real peace. This is what was dreamed of when the guns of the Second World War began to fall silent. That war turned our land into a field of brutal battles, abuse in the occupied territory, mass destruction of people and lives. Losses of the Ukrainian people...
description_uk: Сьогодні День пам’яті та перемоги над нацизмом. День, коли вся Європа відзначає завершення найстрашнішої війни ХХ століття – війни, після якої мав би бути тільки справжній мир. Саме так тоді мріялось, коли гармати Другої світової почали замовкати. Та війна перетворила нашу землю на поле жорстоких битв, знущань на окупованій території, масового знищення людей і життя. Втрати українського народу...
